# Functional Requirements Quality Checklist: Register Account

**Purpose**: Unit-test the clarity, completeness, and consistency of requirements for the registration flow and its validation/error messaging.
**Created**: February 5, 2026
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are all UC-01 registration steps (form display, submission, validation, account creation, redirect) represented in requirements? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK002 Are required registration fields (name, email, password) explicitly specified in requirements, not only in assumptions? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements; Spec §Assumptions]
- [x] CHK003 Are validation rules for email format, email uniqueness, and password strength fully specified in requirements? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK004 Is resubmission after errors explicitly required (not only described in scenarios)? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements; Spec §User Scenarios & Testing]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK005 Is "field-level error message" defined with objective criteria or examples to avoid ambiguity? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK006 Is the password rule stated as concrete, testable criteria (length and character classes) without qualifiers? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements; Spec §Clarifications]
- [x] CHK007 Is email uniqueness clearly stated and applied consistently in requirements? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements; Spec §Clarifications]
- [x] CHK008 Is the redirect destination after successful registration explicitly named without ambiguity? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK009 Do user stories and acceptance scenarios align with requirements for validation and error handling? [Consistency, Spec §User Scenarios & Testing; Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK010 Are assumptions (required fields, password rule, email uniqueness) consistent with functional requirements? [Consistency, Spec §Assumptions; Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK011 Do success criteria align with requirements for no account creation on failure and redirect on success? [Consistency, Spec §Success Criteria; Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK012 Are success criteria traceable to UC01-AT-01 through UC01-AT-07 with clear pass conditions? [Measurability, Spec §Success Criteria]
- [x] CHK013 Do success criteria avoid implementation detail while remaining objectively verifiable? [Clarity, Spec §Success Criteria]
- [x] CHK014 Is the post-registration login expectation in success criteria explicitly bounded to UC-01 scope? [Completeness, Spec §Success Criteria; Spec §Scope]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK015 Are primary, alternate, and correction flows represented in both requirements and scenarios? [Coverage, Spec §User Scenarios & Testing; Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK016 Are all validation alternatives (invalid email, duplicate email, weak password, missing fields, multiple invalid fields) mapped to explicit requirements? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases; Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK017 Is the recovery path (correct errors and resubmit) defined with required system behavior? [Coverage, Spec §User Scenarios & Testing; Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [x] CHK018 Are multi-field invalid submissions required to surface errors for each invalid field? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases; Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK019 Are missing required field cases specified with expected error granularity? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases; Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK020 Is the intentional exclusion of performance/scalability requirements explicitly stated to prevent ambiguity? [Gap, Spec §Scope] **⚠️ SAFE TO SKIP - Not required by UC-01**
- [ ] CHK021 Are security/privacy requirements for handling credentials explicitly defined or explicitly excluded? [Gap, Spec §Functional Requirements; Spec §Assumptions] **⚠️ SAFE TO SKIP - Not required by UC-01**

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK022 Are documented dependencies (registration page, user account store) sufficient to define behavior boundaries? [Completeness, Spec §Dependencies]
- [x] CHK023 Are assumptions validated against UC-01 acceptance tests and not conflicting with scope? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions; Spec §Scope]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [x] CHK024 Is any subjective language (e.g., "clear error message") clarified with objective criteria? [Ambiguity, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK025 Are there conflicts between scope exclusions and success criteria that require resolution? [Conflict, Spec §Scope; Spec §Success Criteria]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
